description: A marine biologist needs to renumber all dives in her Subsurface log so the numbers match her actual lifetime dive count. She completed 42 dives before using Subsurface, so her logged dives in the file /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf should be renumbered to start from number 43. Renumber all dives in the currently open log sequentially starting from 43 and save the changes to /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf.
